<var>
$DPS$ = (Damage * Cash Shot) / (Spin Time + (Firerate * (Cash Shot--)))
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$IPS$ = Income / (Spin Time + (Firerate * (Cash Shot--)))
$IE$ = (Income + Cash Shot * Damage) / (Cash Shot * Damage)
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 550; 200; 600; 2000; 3000; 7777
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 550; 200; 500; 2000; 3500; 7000
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 3; ;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Steady Hand; Lucky Shot; Deadly Precision; Double Tap; Outlawed
$FNC-PVP-UPGRADE$ = Steady Hand; Lucky Shot; Faster Instincts; Double Tap; Outlawed
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 4999425200; 5523233366; 5523231844; 5523234030; 5523234990
$DREF$ = <ref name=dps>DPS is calculated as (Damage × Cash Shot) ÷ (Spin Time + (Firerate × (Cash Shot - 1))).</ref>
$IREF$ = <ref name=ips>This is calculated as Income ÷ (Spin Time + (Firerate × (Cash Shot - 1))).</ref>
$IEREF$ = <ref name=ie>Money generated per 1 damage is calculated as (Income + Cash Shot × Damage) ÷ (Cash Shot × Damage).</ref>
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Spin Time !! Cash Shot !! Income !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency !! Income Per Second$IREF$ !! Income Efficiency$IEREF$
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 1 || 2 || 6 || {{Money|30}} || 13 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 0.9 || 1.25 || 6 || {{Money|30}} || 15 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 5 || 0.9 || 1.25 || 6 || {{Money|50}} || 15 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 0.6 || 1 || 6 || {{Money|45}} || 17.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 0.35 || 1 || 12 || {{Money|125}} || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 24 || 0.35 || 1 || 12 || {{Money|185}} || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Spin Time !! Cash Shot !! Income !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency !! Income Per Second$IREF$ !! Income Efficiency$IEREF$
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || 1 || 1.25 || 6 || {{Money|50}} || 14 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || 0.8 || 1 || 6 || {{Money|50}} || 14.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 6 || 0.8 || 1 || 6 || {{Money|60}} || 16 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 0.5 || 0.75 || 6 || {{Money|75}} || 18 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 0.25 || 0.75 || 12 || {{Money|175}} || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 16 || 0.25 || 0.75 || 12 || {{Money|300}} || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$IPS$}} || {{Money|$IE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
